value: 일본 국외 거주 외국인 여권 소지자. 'Temporary Visitor' 체류자격으로 입국한 자만 구매 가능. 일본 국적자 또는 일본 거주 외국인은 구매 불가.

value.비고: 2023년 10월 인상 후 유지. 2025-2026 추가 인상 없음.

value: 한국 국적자는 90일 이내 관광 목적 무비자 입국 가능. 여권 잔여 유효기간 제한 없음 (체류 기간 이상 권장). Visit Japan Web 사전 등록 권장.
Suica/PASMO 등 IC카드로 전철, 버스, 편의점 결제 가능. 물리 카드 재고 부족은 2025.3월 공식 해소. Welcome Suica(관광객용, 28일 유효) 주요 역에서 판매 재개. 모바일 Suica(Apple/Google) 및 Welcome Suica Mobile(iPhone, 180일 유효) 이용 가능.
지정석(Reserved)과 자유석(Non-reserved) 구분. JR Pass 소지 시 지정석 무료 예약 가능 (Nozomi/Mizuho 제외). 자유석은 선착순 탑승.
면세 범위: 주류 3병(760ml 이하), 담배 200개비(거주자)/400개비(비거주자), 향수 2oz, 기타 품목 20만엔 이하. 초과 시 신고 및 관세 부과.

value.비고: 구급차 무료, 치료비는 별도. 119/110은 일본어 우선이나 통역 연결 가능.

value: Visit Japan Web은 웹 기반 서비스(앱 불필요). 여권 정보, 입국심사(하선카드), 세관신고, 면세쇼핑 3개 항목 사전 등록. 등록 후 QR코드 발급 → 공항 도착 시 제시. 2026년 현재 필수는 아니나 강력 권장 (심사 시간 대폭 단축). 스크린샷 불가, 라이브 접속 필요.

신제도_2026_11월.방식: 환급형 (구매 시 세금 포함 → 출국 시 환급)

value: Foreigners can use Visit Japan Web for immigration procedures (immigration clearance, customs declaration) and tax-free purchases during their stay in Japan.

All foreign nationals who need to obtain a short-term visa to Japan and currently reside in Australia, Brazil, Cambodia, Canada, Saudi Arabia, South Africa, Taiwan, United Kingdom, or U.S.A. are eligible to apply for a tourist visa online.

Foreign visitors in Japan can receive emergency medical assistance including medical referrals, interpretation services, hospital arrangements, emergency patient transports, and assistance with reporting theft or loss of travel documents.
Personal belongings are not subject to customs duties as long as their quantity is reasonable for normal consumption over a fixed period of time (maximum 90 days for many touristic visas).

Japan is a cash society, but credit cards and debit cards are accepted in most places in Japanese cities.

IC travel cards can be purchased at station ticket counters or automatic ticket vending machines at most railway stations in Japan. They require a deposit and can be used for payments at many convenience stores, shops, vending machines, and public transportation.

Capsule hotels in Japan typically have very limited space for suitcases, so if you need them open you will either block the exit or have to keep them on the bed; bathrooms are usually all-in-one plastic units with walls, bathtub, floor, and basin made of the same material and color.

Capsule hotels in Japan typically have very limited space for suitcases; if you need to keep them open, you may block the exit or have to keep them on the bed. Bathrooms are usually all-in-one plastic units with walls, bathtub, floor, and basin made of the same material and color. Beds are semi-double size regardless of booking for one or two persons. Rooms include a desk with a TV, a tiny fridge underneath, a kettle with mugs and tea, a full-length mirror, and some hanging space near the exit.
For popular restaurants in Japan, it is generally a good idea to make a reservation in advance, unless the restaurant does not accept bookings.

To use a Japan travel SIM card, insert the SIM into your phone upon arrival, configure the APN settings, and the SIM will self-activate once your phone detects a cellular signal. If your phone is dual SIM, ensure only the Japan travel SIM is inserted in the primary SIM slot.

Suica and Pasmo cards are widely accepted for transportation and other transactions. Setting and application is required before using the 4G prepaid SIM.
